name: sensipy
summary: A Python toolkit to simulate instrument sensitivity and plan follow-up observations of time-variable astrophysical sources with gamma-ray observatories.
author: Jarred Green, Barbara Patricelli, Antonio Stamerra, Monica Seglar-Arroyo
author_email: Jarred Green <jgreen@mpp.mpg.de>, Barbara Patricelli <barbara.patricelli@inaf.it>, Antonio Stamerra <antonio.stamerra@inaf.it>, Monica Seglar-Arroyo <mseglar@ifae.es>
